name: Context Menu
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Context Menu primitive composed from the local Menu foundation, adding model-owned context points, context-key opening, context-trigger attributes, deterministic point anchoring, and Mac/non-Mac pointer-release behavior without duplicating Menu item, submenu, checked item, radio item, or roving-focus semantics.

registry.reason: Context Menu reuses the local Menu item, submenu, checked item, radio item, highlight, typeahead, and roving-focus semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, pointer, keyboard, and context-menu event helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and event payloads.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Context Menu primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Context Menu primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Context Menu composes the local Menu foundation for item roles, checkbox/radio state, submenu state, highlight, typeahead, and roving focus.
deviations.rationale: The dependency plan established Menu as the reusable foundation for Context Menu.

deviations.summary: The right-click point is emitted as a typed fact and passed back through the model instead of being hidden in mutable component-local state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow and keeps pointer-derived state visible in model data.

deviations.summary: The root positioner exposes deterministic context-point data attributes and fixed left/top styles without runtime collision measurement.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not an ad hoc render helper side effect.

deviations.summary: Long-press touch timers are not implemented in the installable primitive; right-click, context-key, and platform-specific pointer release behavior are covered.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit timer-driven touch recognition needs a command/subscription boundary instead of mutable render-local timeouts.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native Base UI Context Menu primitive composed from the local Menu foundation, adding model-owned context points, context-key opening, context-trigger attributes, deterministic point anchoring, and Mac/non-Mac pointer-release behavior without duplicating Menu item, submenu, checked item, radio item, or roving-focus semantics.
